sections.title: If Tribal Totem is not completed

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Hello. I Kangai Mau of the Rantuki tribe.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I looking for someone brave to go on important mission for me. Someone skilled in thievery and sneaking about. I am told I can find such people in Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me of this mission.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I need someone to go on a mission to the city of Ardougne. There you will find the house of Lord Handelmort. In his house he has our tribal totem.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: We need it back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does he have it?

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Lord Handelmort is an Ardougnese explorer which means he think he have the right to come to my tribal home, steal our stuff and put in his private museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I will get it back.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Best of luck with that adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I find Handelmort's house? Ardougne is a big place...

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I don't know Ardougne. You tell me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Let's hope I find some help soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of adventure!

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Adventure is something I may be able to give.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: I need someone to go on a mission to the city of Ardougne. There you will find the house of Lord Handelmort. In his house he has our tribal totem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the Rantuki tribe?

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: A proud and noble tribe of Karamja. But now we are few, as men come from across sea, steal our land, and settle on our hunting grounds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what are you doing in Brimhaven?

sections.title: After the completion of the quest

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Many greetings esteemed thief.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Kangai Mau
lines.text: Congrats. Here!
